name: adb_install_plugin_debug_apk
description: adb install -r the plugin debug APK (default: app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk under PA2_PLUGIN_GRADLE_ROOT). Optional apk_path overrides. Run assembleDebug first. Requires PA2_PLUGIN_GRADLE_ROOT when using default path.

apk_path.description: Optional absolute path to app-debug.apk; default uses PA2_PLUGIN_GRADLE_ROOT
